theme: Keys of Releasing the Miracle Working Power of the Holy Ghost
summary: On Pentecost the Holy Spirit came with all the anointing power for the church. This teaching explores spiritual keys that fan the power of the Spirit into flame so miracle working power can be released.
fullNotes: On Pentecost the Holy Spirit came with all the anointing power for the church. However, the power of the Holy Spirit is not automatic for the believer. For the Holy Spirit to release miracle working power, He has to be fanned into flame. To do this, we need to deploy spiritual keys to fan the power of the Spirit for the miraculous to happen.

sessions.title: Key #1: Be in One Accord in Prayer
sessions.comment: It is absolutely important that believers gather together in unity to fellowship and pray. Power is only given to those in unity of fellowship. No unity, no love, no power. You cannot walk in power if you are a lone ranger. Stay-at-home believers cannot exercise spiritual power. Being too busy to be with the church is a sign of no power.

sessions.title: Key #2: Laying on of Hands
sessions.comment: The frequent laying on of hands by mature ministers on those in regular fellowship and unity with the church grants access to the power of the Holy Spirit.

sessions.title: Key #3: Prophetic Praise, Prophetic Tongues & Prophesy
sessions.comment: The Holy Spirit loves an atmosphere of prophetic praise and worship. In this atmosphere, praise God with all kinds of tongues. Praise God with your native tongue and other unknown tongues. Start with tongues you know and understand and grow. Prophetic worship and tongues exalt God on what He has done. After the tongues, begin to prophesy. To prophesy is to give assignment to the Holy Spirit on what to do. Speak, declare and decree things in the atmosphere of worship.

sessions.title: Key #4: Use of Prophetic Materials
sessions.comment: Material things can be used to arouse the power of the Holy Spirit to act. Things in nature have ears and voices; they speak to the spiritual world. When subjected to God, they are used by the Holy Spirit as signs to activate heavenly agenda. You need to discern which material to use, when, how and where. Never use these materials prophetically if you are not fully immersed in Christ.

author: Elder Yaakov

theme: Faith Actions That Activate Heavenly Response After Prayer
summary: Prayer authorizes heaven to act on earth through the Holy Spirit and holy angels. After prayer, believers must also take actions of faith so heaven can respond to the situation needing mercy.
fullNotes: When you pray, angels collect the prayers from the Holy Spirit and offer them to the four living creatures and the twenty four elders who sit around the throne of God. In turn, the four living creatures and the twenty four elders offer the prayers of the saints to the Father and Jesus Christ. After these offerings of prayer, the Holy Spirit and the angels responsible for human affairs are authorized to take action. The hand of God on earth is activated through the Holy Spirit and His holy angels.

If we do not pray, the Holy Spirit and angels are idle, the four living creatures and the twenty four elders have nothing to offer at the throne of God. See Revelation 5:8-10 and Revelation 8:3-5. Without prayer, heaven cannot help earth. Human prayer is the energy and license that authorizes heaven to move on earth.

However, for the Holy Spirit and angels to produce answers and miracles on earth, there are faith actions that those who pray must perform after prayer, for heaven to act. That is to say that for heaven to act, we need prayer plus actions of faith. Faith without action is dead. Prayer without faith actions is dead.

It is important to understand that prayer is directed to heaven to authorize heaven to act on a situation. But a faith action is directed at the object needing mercy by another human being, so that heaven can act upon that situation. After prayer, heaven always waits for a human action of faith before it can respond. Many prayers are never answered because we are afraid to carry out actions of faith after prayer.

You must discern each situation and get revelation on what faith action is needed in what situation. If one is full of prayer and fasting, the Holy Spirit will reveal what faith action is needed. Remember, anyone who is full of prayer and fasting can perform faith actions. It is not for ministers alone, but for the saints.

sessions.title: Faith Action #1: Bless, Lay Hands, Anoint With Oil
sessions.comment: To produce miracle power from the Holy Spirit and angels, it is important to move by actions of faith and bless, lay hands and anoint with oil the person or object upon which we need heaven to act after prayer. These can be done for people, animals, land, trees and objects. Bless, lay hands, and anoint with oil in the name of Jesus through the power of the Holy Spirit.

sessions.title: Faith Action #2: Command, Cast Out & Rebuke Evil Spirits & Demons
sessions.comment: The second faith action is by commanding demons and evil spirits to be cast out from people, animals, places, objects and other situations in the name of Jesus by the power of the Holy Spirit. When engaging demons and wicked spirits, one must be full of prayer and fasting.

sessions.title: Faith Action #3: Prophesy, Decree, Declare & Do Prophetic Actions
sessions.comment: The third faith action is to prophesy, do prophetic actions, decree and declare logos and rhema revelations that the Holy Spirit puts in your heart and mouth. The best moments to prophesy and decree prophetic declarations and actions is after an intense prayer, praise and worship session. Spiritual songs and hymns arouse the prophetic grace. Prophesy boldly. Speak prophetically to the person or thing needing the prophetic power of the Holy Spirit. Some things will look unusual when you act prophetically.
